title: Lentil Stew
description: A hearty and comforting lentil stew, perfect for a cold day. This vegan recipe is made with red lentils, onions, garlic, and a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add carrots and potatoes and cook for another 5 minutes.
Add lentils, Mediterranean seasoning, thyme, and tomato paste. Stir to combine.
Add stew and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30-40 minutes, or until lentils are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
